name: Smart City Infrastructure BBN
description: A Bayesian Belief Network modeling a smart city infrastructure system with ~100 nodes across 5 hierarchical layers. Causality flows from root causes (Layer 1) through infrastructure (Layer 2), services (Layer 3), outcomes (Layer 4) to quality-of-life indicators (Layer 5).

nodes.label: Climate Conditions
nodes.description: Overall climate patterns affecting the city. Prior derived from weather resilience test suite results.

testQuery.description: Query weather resilience test results to determine climate condition distribution based on pass/fail/skip rates across severity categories.
logs: 2025-06-15T10:23:01Z [INFO] Connecting to test database at test-data-experiment-d8650b.gitlab.io
2025-06-15T10:23:02Z [INFO] Computed prior distribution from test result categories

nodes.label: Economic Policy
nodes.description: Government economic policy orientation. Prior derived from policy compliance test suite.

testQuery.description: Query policy compliance test results to classify economic policy stance based on regulatory test outcomes.
logs: 2025-06-15T10:24:10Z [INFO] Connecting to test database at test-data-experiment-d8650b.gitlab.io
2025-06-15T10:24:11Z [INFO] Computed prior distribution from test result classification

nodes.label: Population Growth
nodes.description: Rate of population change in the metropolitan area

nodes.label: Technology Investment
nodes.description: Level of public and private technology investment. Prior derived from tech integration test suite.

testQuery.description: Query technology integration test results to assess investment level based on feature adoption and API stability tests.
